name: preferences: Settings checkbox reports state and toggles (round-trip)
comment: Now possible on the new AutoPilot: checkbox AXValue (an NSNumber) is read as '0'/'1', and `press` reliably toggles a small control (a coordinate click is less reliable). 'Rainbow brackets' defaults ON, so its checkbox reads '1'; pressing it flips to '0', and the View > 'Rainbow Brackets' menu item's `marked` follows (asserted after the menu is opened by the `menu` action's validation). This is the real pref round-trip that was un-testable before.
